productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Blue Shoes
description: Style NoteWing tip brogueing on a casual sneaker. Now who would have thought of that if not united colors of benetton? Referencing the conservative formal brogue, this coffee brown sneaker pays a tongue-in-cheek tribute to conventional shoe styles. Wear this with a tonal leather jacket or a monochrome tee (with your favourite jeans) and you won't go wrong!Product DetailsTapering toed, casual sneaker in dusty blue with lace-up fastening and wing-tip broguesSynthetic leather upper with brogue details on the toe box, midfoot and backfootPadded collar and tongue (with branding) and an ergonomically shaped insolePU midsoleTPU outsole with patterned nubsMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in sunlight
